title: 菊花賞の後に・次に背中を見せるのは

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week triumphs over Seiun Sky in the
Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, Seiun Sky is thirsty for revenge and
challenges Special Week to a rematch, spurring
her to shift her focus toward the spring Tenno
Sho.
